name: The-Omnipotent-X-Destroyer
description: Internet's Most Dangerous 24/7 Silent Bot Hunter and Data Exfiltrator

GH_TOKENS.description: Apne saare GitHub tokens yahan dalo, comma (,) se separate karke. Example: ghp_123,ghp_456

BOT_TOKEN.description: Tera wo bot jo tujhe logs bhejega (Log Bot Token)

LOG_CHAT.description: Tera Telegram Group ID jahan sara 'Maal' aayega. Example: -100123456789

API_ID.description: Telegram API ID (Optional, defaults to God-Level)

API_HASH.description: Telegram API Hash (Optional, defaults to God-Level)
